projects.name: GPM Automation Console

projects.health: Requires GPM Login local API at http://127.0.0.1:19995.

readme.summary: Local desktop app for managing and automating GPM Login profiles through the local API at `http://127.0.0.1:19995`. For project decisions and next development direction, see `PROJECT_CONTEXT.md`.

context.summary: Living context file for `GPM Automation Console`. This file should capture decisions, product direction, implementation assumptions, and next development ideas. Keep `README.md` focused on setup and usage. Keep `CHANGELOG.md` focused on upd

changelog.summary: Update log for `GPM Automation Console`. Use this file to find a stable rollback point after each feature update. Every meaningful update should include the commit hash, affected areas, verification result, and rollback command.

release.summary: Release and update process for `GPM Automation Console`. The desktop app is packaged with Electron Builder as a Windows NSIS web installer. Public GitHub Releases are used as the install payload host and update feed for `electron-updater`.

projects.name: YT Multistream Console
projects.summary: Local desktop console for running multi-channel YouTube livestream jobs from local video files or Google Drive links.
projects.nextAction: Add stream profile templates for 720p, 1080p, and low bandwidth.
nextActions: Add stream profile templates for 720p, 1080p, and low bandwidth.

projects.health: Requires bundled FFmpeg and valid YouTube RTMP stream keys. Stream keys must stay masked in logs.

readme.summary: Desktop app for operating multiple YouTube livestream channels from one source set. - Multi-channel stream queue (start/stop per channel or all channels).
